subcodes.first_line: Thou hadst made reference in thy letter to agriculture. On this matter He hath laid down the following universal rule
subcodes.first_line_orig: در فقره جناب ملا حسین و ابن ایشان علیهما بهاء الله مرقوم فرموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @agriculture, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @consolation and comfort, @work as worship, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession
